title: Loops vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Loops vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Loops and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. Loops is built for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Loops wins for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Loops or Customer.io?
faq.a: Loops starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to Loops?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
